channel.title: Fault-Injection on Raelize - Embedded Device Security Services Consultancy Testing Research Training
channel.description: Recent content in Fault-Injection on Raelize - Embedded Device Security Services Consultancy Testing Research Training

item.title: AI-FI: Giving Claude Code Glitch Skills for Bypassing Secure Boot
item.description: We let an AI orchestrate every part of a real fault-injection attack — driving the bench instruments, debugging the setup, reverse-engineering the ROM, building a live monitoring dashboard mid-campaign. The result: an autonomous bypass of ESP32 Secure Boot V1. To our knowledge, this is the first time AI-driven fault injection of this kind has been publicly demonstrated.
